description_long: This nightclub is a large, rectangular commercial building with a flat roof and a modern, industrial facade. The front features a prominent entrance with a wide awning, flanked by dark wall panels and a central illuminated sign above the doorway. The exterior combines dark gray and black materials with wood-toned accents, and there are several balconies and platforms on the sides, some with railings. Large, vibrant murals or posters are visible on one side, adding a lively and artistic touch to the otherwise minimalist structure. The rear and one side are more utilitarian, with minimal decoration and a few service doors or loading areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a mix of functional and decorative elements typical of contemporary nightlife venues.
description: A modern, rectangular nightclub with a flat roof, dark facade, wood accents, and vibrant murals, featuring a prominent entrance and side balconies.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a wide awning, central signage, and dark wall panels, with a small platform and steps leading up.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals a more utilitarian side with minimal decoration, service doors, and some side platforms.
description_view_2: This side view highlights large, colorful murals or posters, wood-toned balconies, and railings, giving a lively and artistic impression.
description_view_3: The opposite side is plain and functional, with a solid gray wall, a small platform, and minimal architectural features.
attribute_signage: A central illuminated sign above the main entrance, rectangular in shape, displaying a graphic or logo, likely made of backlit plastic or glass. Additional mural-style graphics or posters are visible on one side wall.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is wide and centrally located, featuring a flat awning above, flanked by dark wall panels and a prominent illuminated sign. There are steps and a small platform leading up to the doors, with minimal decorative elements and a clean, geometric design.
